title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete - Starting with no WiFi connection
scenario: Account deletion fails gracefully with "Unable to perform task" popup when WiFi is disconnected, then succeeds on Retry after reconnecting WiFi in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and log in with a Lens tenant account.
2. Disconnect the device from WiFi (turn off WiFi or enable Airplane Mode).
3. Navigate to the Home screen, then go to General → Account tab.
4. Tap the Delete icon (trash/bin icon) next to the account.
5. Tap Confirm on the deletion confirmation dialog.
9. Navigate back to General → Account tab and tap the Delete icon again.
10. Tap Confirm, then tap "Retry" on the popup.
expected: When WiFi is disconnected: A popup appears with the message "Unable to perform task..." and two buttons: "Later" and "Retry". Tapping "Later" dismisses the popup and returns the user to the Account screen. After reconnecting WiFi and tapping "Retry", the account deletion proceeds successfully and the user is logged out of the app.
